title: rubus mitis
intro: Rubus mitis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or creeping raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus mitis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Rubus mitis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used to make a medicinal infusion that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
